title.rendered: We Give You… The Perfect Christmas Gift  – International Transfers this Festive Season

content.rendered:
Whether you are looking for a gift for Grandpa Joe who emigrated to Australia, something special for Auntie Sarah who now lives in Spain during the winter months or your daughter Amelia who works in Dubai, we have found the perfect Christmas present for everyone… cash.

How many times have you left it too late to send a gift overseas so it won’t arrive in time for Christmas? Or have you found the perfect present and the postage ended up costing more than the gift? Or, you are just not sure what to buy someone?

Have you considered an international money transfer? It is a WIN WIN for everyone.

✓ No battling the Christmas crowds at the shops
✓ No wrapping
✓ No queuing at the post office
✓ No insane postage costs
✓ No worries about it not arriving on time
✓ No EU taxes (now charged as a result of Brexit)
✓ No unwanted Christmas gifts
✓ No overspending
✓ No lost or damaged packages
✓ The family member can buy exactly what they want
✓ Everyone is happy

December is one of the busiest months for international money transfers as more and more people discover this stress-free way to do Christmas shopping. More than 40% of money transfers in December are gifts to friends and family members.

If you use a trusted international money transfer company like TravelFX, the money you transfer will arrive in your family member’s bank account in one to two days. You don’t even have to leave your home to make the transfer. All you need is your computer or mobile device. AND there are no transfer fees for sending the money online.

There are five really easy steps:

  1. Select the currency you want to transfer
  2. Fill in your personal information and the details of the person you are sending the money to
  3. Make a bank transfer from your account to TravelFX
  4. You receive email confirmation of the transfer
  5. We will send you updates on the progress of the transfer

By using a money transfer company like TravelFX you are not paying hefty bank fees for the transfer, the exchange rates are usually better than the banks and it is a quick and easy online transfer.

All transactions are totally safe and secure. We use an industry-leading technology and we guarantee your money will arrive safely every single time.

Buying Christmas presents for family can be a huge challenge and extremely stressful. Who knows how many of these gifts are actually appreciated or even used. This way, your friends or family members can use the money for a gift or treat they really want, or even to help them with living expenses, and you are the favourite family member.

It is a WIN WIN, isn’t it? Find out more about international transfers and transferring money online with TravelFX.

itemListElement.name: We Give You… The Perfect Christmas Gift – International Transfers this Festive Season

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
